results package

Submodules

results.utils module

results.utils.alk_gfw_duplicates(df: DataFrame, target_column: str) → tuple[int, DataFrame][source]

Find duplicate rows in a DataFrame based on the target column.

results.utils.equation_duplicates(df: DataFrame, column_of_interest: str) → tuple[int, DataFrame][source]

Find duplicate rows in a DataFrame based on the equation column.

results.utils.plot_source_hist(df: DataFrame, title: str | None = None, rotation: int = 45, ax: Axes | None = None, color: str = 'blue', label: str | None = None) → None[source]

Plot the distribution of conflicting attributes in a DataFrame on the given axes.

Parameters: df (pd.DataFrame): The data frame containing the data to plot. title (str): The title of the plot. rotation (int): The rotation angle of the x-axis labels. ax (plt.Axes): Existing axes to plot on. If None, creates a new figure and axes. color (str): Color of the histogram. label (str): Label for the histogram (for legend).

Returns: None

results.utils.remove_ones_full(equation: Series) → Series[source]

removes all instances of ‘1’ from a series of equations
